primary_purpose: A minimal archived scaffold for a "public simulation and blueprint layer" — a white-room/dojo environment intended for rehearsing DAG pipelines and modular agent interactions before hardening them in production logic (per README.md @ e7cfd87).
classification_rationale: Repo is GitHub-archived (archived:true, pushed_at 2025-07-15) and consists of only 8 files / 5 commits on a single `main` branch: README, two JSON stubs, an aider config, an init script, a no-op CI workflow, .gitignore, and an empty construct_templates/.gitkeep. README.md self-describes it as "the public simulation and blueprint layer ... a white-room environment for rehearsing DAG pipelines" — i.e., a sandbox, never a production/normative artifact. The only referenced runnable artifact (pipeline_manifest.json -> construct_templates/mock_validator_chain.json) does not exist (404; only .gitkeep present), confirming it never progressed past scaffolding. It also references stale repo names (afi-core, afi-labs). Classification STALE: archived, abandoned scaffold with stale naming, no normative or production role.
protocol_touchpoints: validator/PoI simulation only (mock-validator-flow, mock data agents)

reference_only_assumptions.quote: afi-labs (private experiments) ➜ afi-construct (public simulation) ➜ afi-core (production logic)
Test blueprints before they’re hardened in `afi-core`
"repo_name": "afi-core", "description": "Agentic Financial Intelligence: Core module config for schemas, prompts, and runtime validation"

contradictions.title: Divergent local blueprint.schema.json competes with normative afi-config blueprint.schema.json
contradictions.detail: This repo ships its own blueprint.schema.json (draft-07, fields id/nodes/edges/config) that diverges from the protocol-normative blueprint.schema.json named in the North Star. As an archived sandbox copy it is harmless now, but a stray schema with the same canonical filename risks being mistaken for the normative version. It defines no determinism, no plugin/analyst/validator version pinning, and no replay topology fields that the normative blueprint/pipeline schemas require.
contradictions.evidence: blueprint.schema.json:1-3 "$schema: draft-07 ... title: AFI Construct Blueprint Schema ... required: [id, nodes, edges]"

contradictions.title: Stale repo-lineage and 'afi-core' production naming
contradictions.detail: README and aider config encode a stale topology (afi-labs -> afi-construct -> afi-core) and self-identify the config as afi-core. 'afi-core' is a stale/renamed repo name per the known-tensions list; the reference spine is gateway -> reactor DAG -> vault -> mint, not an afi-core monolith. Treating this as documentation could mislead about the protocol's repo map.
contradictions.evidence: README.md "afi-labs (private experiments) ➜ afi-construct (public simulation) ➜ afi-core (production logic)"; .aider.conf.json "repo_name": "afi-core"

upstream: afi-labs (named as upstream private-experiments source in README lineage)
downstream: afi-core (named as production-logic target where blueprints are 'hardened'; afi-core is a stale/renamed name)

notable_findings.title: Repo is an abandoned 8-file scaffold, archived after last push
notable_findings.evidence: gh api repos/AFI-Protocol/afi-construct -> archived:true, pushed_at 2025-07-15; git tree HEAD e7cfd87 lists only: README.md, blueprint.schema.json, pipeline_manifest.json, .aider.conf.json, init_repo.sh, .github/workflows/ci.yml, .gitignore, construct_templates/.gitkeep
notable_findings.recommendation: Keep archived; treat as historical scaffold only. Exclude from normative repo map.

notable_findings.title: Referenced pipeline blueprint entry is missing (broken manifest)
notable_findings.evidence: pipeline_manifest.json "entry": "construct_templates/mock_validator_chain.json" -> GET contents/construct_templates/mock_validator_chain.json returns 404; construct_templates/ holds only .gitkeep
notable_findings.recommendation: None (archived). Confirms scaffold never reached a runnable pipeline; ignore for replay/determinism analysis.

notable_findings.title: Self-describes as simulation 'Construct' / dojo, explicitly NOT production
notable_findings.evidence: README.md "a white-room environment for rehearsing DAG pipelines ... Use this repo like The Construct from The Matrix: a safe space to simulate the unreal, until it becomes real."
notable_findings.recommendation: Treat as RESEARCH/simulation sandbox; no normative weight. None required.

notable_findings.title: PoI/validator simulation only, with mock data agents
notable_findings.evidence: pipeline_manifest.json {"id":"mock-validator-flow","description":"Simulates a PoI validation pipeline using mock data agents."}
notable_findings.recommendation: Not a real validator/replay artifact; do not conflate with VALIDATOR_REPLAY_SPEC. None required.

notable_findings.title: aider config uses OpenAI gpt-4o models and misnames repo as afi-core
notable_findings.evidence: .aider.conf.json "message_model":"gpt-4o","main_model":"gpt-4o","weak_model":"gpt-4o-mini","repo_name":"afi-core"; include globs (schemas/**, runtime/**, cli/**) point at dirs absent from this repo
notable_findings.recommendation: Tag stale; config was copied from/for another repo (afi-core) and does not match afi-construct contents.

notable_findings.title: CI workflow is a no-op stub
notable_findings.evidence: .github/workflows/ci.yml final step: "- run: echo \"CI workflow initialized\"" (no build/test/lint)
notable_findings.recommendation: None. Confirms no enforced validation/determinism gates here.

notable_findings.title: No portable-protocol normative concepts present (pattern-group sweep negative)
notable_findings.evidence: Full-content review of all 8 files: zero hits for mongodb|MongoTSSD|vault|TSSD|VaultedSignalRecord, usignal|USS|cpj|CPJ, mintForSignal|coordinateMint|beneficiary|epoch, replay|ReplaySession|determinism|codex, publicSurface|proprietaryDetail, AFIMintCoordinator|AFISignalReceipt|EmissionsMinted, BigQuery|kafka|warehouse, postgresql|timescaledb|influxdb
notable_findings.recommendation: Excludes this repo from commitment/evidence/scoring-DAG/analytics planes; no replay-critical artifacts. None required.
